name: Paul's App Store
subtitle: Apps I built for me, my friends, and my family.
description: A personal app store. Apps here are vibe-coded by Paul (with a lot of help from Claude) and shipped through AltStore. If you trust Paul, you can probably trust the apps.

apps.name: Hello World
apps.subtitle: Wave hello to your own app store.
apps.localizedDescription: The first app built and shipped through the personal app store pipeline: scaffolded by Claude Code, built with xcodebuild, served by GitHub Pages, installed by AltStore.

versions.localizedDescription: First real build — end-to-end pipeline test.

apps.name: Double Exclam Scan
apps.subtitle: Scan a chess board or scoresheet, analyse on Lichess.
apps.localizedDescription: Photograph a chess board or a handwritten scoresheet — from the camera, Photos, or Files. Review the position on an editable board, scrub through scanned games move by move, then open it straight in Lichess analysis. Scanning is stubbed with test data in this build; the full scanner is coming.

versions.localizedDescription: Initial shell: board & scoresheet scan flows with test data, editable board, game replay, Lichess analysis.
